name: Leslie's, Inc.
business: Leslie's sells pool and spa care products including chemicals, equipment, cleaning accessories, and parts, as well as installation and repair services. It serves residential consumers and pool professionals, and commercial property operators. The company operates over 1,000 retail locations and an e-commerce platform.

exposures.sentence: This includes chemicals, new and replacement parts, cleaning and maintenance equipment, safety, recreational, and fitness-related products.

Today, we are the largest and most trusted direct-to-consumer brand in our segment, serving residential consumers and pool professionals, and many of the largest commercial property operators in the country.

With over 1,000 retail locations, an integrated, digitally forward omnichannel strategy, and a horizontally integrated, nationwide ecosystem under the Leslie's and In the Swim brands, among others, we have built a market-leading share of residential aftermarket product spend, based on 2024 industry analyst reports, and a physical network larger than the sum of our 20 largest competitors.
a regionally located, hub-and-spoke distribution system throughout the continental United States.

tamClaims.claim: $15 billion U.S. pool and spa care industry
tamClaims.sentence: the Company today known simply as Leslie s has over six decades of disruptive retail innovation in the $15 billion U.S. pool and spa care industry.
